message:
fix(mobile): finalize gene map interaction and responsive grid enhancements

- SequenceView: Wired up gene map click interactions to navigate sequence.
- CanvasSequenceGridRenderer: Enforced text rendering on small cells for readability.
- Hooks: Updated useSequenceGrid to support orientation changes dynamically.
- Styles: Polished landscape and portrait mobile layouts.
